core.description: Executes a command string. Supports chaining multiple commands with semicolons.
Simulates a click or double-click event on a DOM element.
Executes a function by dot-notation path with arguments.
Initializes the Front framework and sets up the window load listener.
Handles full app initialization: config, event listeners, and asset loading.
Waits for a specified duration in milliseconds before executing a callback.

element.description: Adds one or more CSS classes to an element.
Extracts values inside square brackets from a string. Handles nesting.
Finds elements within a parent node by CSS selector.
Gets the value/property of an element. Resolves correct property by tag (value, src, textContent, etc.).
Finds the closest ancestor with a specific attribute.
Retrieves a nested property from an object using dot-separated path.
Finds the closest ancestor that is an anchor, button, or label.
Handles onchange callbacks by looking for on[attr]change attributes.
Executes onload actions for an element or NodeList.
Handles form submit events, executing onformsubmit attribute actions.
Applies arithmetic operations (+, -, *, /) to numeric values in attributes or query params.
Resolves a binding value, checking for defaults in {variable:default} syntax.
Resolves the call context of an element into a normalized call structure.
Checks and runs on[event] handlers after an attribute or action executes.
Saves the original state of an element for later reset operations.
Selects elements by CSS selector. Supports [index] suffix for specific matches.
Sets a value or attribute on an element. Handles settext, sethtml, setattr, setvalue, sethref, setsrc.
Toggles one or more CSS classes on an element.

parser.description: Parses a semicolon-separated string into key-value pairs split at the first colon.
Parses a Front command string into a structured object with function name, elements, values, and delay settings.
Safely parses a JSON string. Returns object with value on success, or errorName/errorMessage on failure.
Parses an HTML string into a DOM node. Extracts html/body attributes and doctype.

variables.description: Resets all element attributes to their original captured values.
Resets element innerHTML to its original value.
Replaces {variable} and {variable:default} patterns in element attributes.
Replaces {variable} patterns in element text nodes.

events.description: Adds an event listener, removing any existing duplicate first.
Handles value change events, triggering onvaluechange, onstatevaluechange, and onselectchange callbacks.
Dispatches a custom event on the window with optional detail data.
Removes an event listener from an element.

state.description: Retrieves cached data from local, session, cookie, or window memory.
Removes a cached entry from local or session storage.
Stores data in a cache mechanism with optional format parsing and TTL.
Validates a cached entry against its TTL. Returns data if valid, removes if expired.
Gets the value of a global variable.
Refreshes global variables and updates all live-bound elements via bindglobal.
Sets a global variable accessible throughout the application.

rendering.description: Runs FTML attribute processing on elements matching a selector. The core rendering engine.
Executes deferred attributes (like clone) that depend on a fully processed DOM.
Renders loaded templates into the document structure (header, aside, main, footer).
Resolves relative src paths in HTML by prepending the base href.

network.description: Loads all modules and plugins by injecting script tags.
Loads template HTML files via XHR for multi-page rendering.
Loads variable JSON files from the configured varsDir.
Initiates loading of all application assets (extensions, vars, or templates).
Parses script element attributes to determine modules, plugins, and vars to load.
Checks if all assets are loaded and finalizes the app by running attributes and showing the page.
Creates and sends an XHR request with caching, DOM updates, loaders, and callbacks.

configuration.description: Retrieves config from an element's conf attribute, merged with standard defaults.
Applies global configuration from the script element to the app object.

utility.description: Logs errors to console when debugging is enabled.
Logs information to console when debugging is enabled.
Logs warnings to console when debugging is enabled.
Gets a query string parameter value from a URL or the current page.
